heading: Settlement of accounts: affidavit of company commander
label: 7838 Settlement of accounts: affidavit of company commander
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)483810:1302.R.S. 225 (less 1st sentence); added (3d par.), .Feb. 27, 1877, ch. 6919 Stat. 241The word “anything” is substituted for the words “any matter or circumstance”. The words “properly used” are substituted for the words “legally used and appropriated”. The words “of the case” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4838 of this title

children.text: that vouchers or company books were lost;
anything tending to prove that any apparent deficiency of those articles was caused by unavoidable accident, or by loss in actual service without his fault; or
that all or part of the clothing and supplies was properly used.
